---
pagetitle: "Lecture Slides"
title: "Lecture Slides"
subtitle: "Beamer slide decks for teaching Machine Learning Systems"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Page Title Styling ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
#title-block-header {
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  padding-bottom: 0 !important;
}
#title-block-header .title {
  font-size: 2.2rem !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  border: none !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem !important;
}
#title-block-header .subtitle {
  font-size: 1.05rem !important;
  color: #64748b !important;
  font-weight: 400 !important;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem !important;
}

/* ── Hero Band ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hero-band {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a0a12 0%, #2a1520 100%);
  padding: 2.5rem 2rem 1.5rem;
  color: #f0e8ec;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #3a2a32;
  margin-top: -1rem;
}
.hero-inner {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.hero-top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 2.5rem;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .hero-top { flex-direction: column; }
}
.hero-text { flex: 1; }
.hero-text .hero-desc {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #a090a0;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
}
.hero-meta {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.hero-meta a {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.45rem 1.1rem;
  border-radius: 7px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.hero-meta .btn-start {
  background: #BE185D;
  color: white !important;
}
.hero-meta .btn-start:hover { background: #db2777; }
.hero-meta .btn-outline {
  border: 1.5px solid #4a3a42;
  color: #f0e8ec !important;
}
.hero-meta .btn-outline:hover { border-color: #BE185D; color: #f472b6 !important; }
.hero-meta .cc-badge {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #666;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

/* ── Pillars (in hero, right side) ────────────────────────────────── */
.hero-pillars {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 0.6rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 240px;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .hero-pillars { width: 100%; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
}
.hp {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius: 8px;
}
.hp-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; }
.hp-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #d8c8d0;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}
.hp-sub {
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  color: #777;
  display: block;
}

/* ── Numbers (inside hero band) ───────────────────────────────────── */
.hero-numbers {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #3a2a32;
  text-align: center;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .hero-numbers { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .hero-numbers .hn { flex: 0 0 33%; }
}
.hn .hn-big {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #f472b6;
  display: block;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.hn .hn-label {
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  color: #777;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}

/* ── Content Container ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hub-content {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1.5rem 4rem;
}

/* ── Section Headers ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.inv-header {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 2rem 0 0.75rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  background: #fdf2f8;
  border-left: 4px solid #BE185D;
  border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0;
  color: #1a1a2e;
}

/* ── Inventory Table ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.inventory-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
}
.inventory-table td {
  padding: 0.65rem 0.75rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  vertical-align: top;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.inventory-table td:first-child {
  width: 160px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a1a2e;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.inventory-table td:nth-child(2) {
  color: #4a5568;
}
.inventory-table td:last-child {
  width: 120px;
  text-align: right;
}
.inventory-table a {
  color: #BE185D !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}
.inventory-table a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
.inventory-table tr:hover { background: #fefbfc; }

/* ── Volume Cards ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.vol-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(360px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 0;
}
@media (max-width: 500px) {
  .vol-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
.vol-card {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.vol-card:hover {
  border-color: #BE185D;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(190, 24, 93, 0.08);
}
.vol-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; width: 4px; height: 100%;
  background: #BE185D;
}
.vol-card .tag {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #BE185D;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  display: block;
}
.vol-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.vol-card p {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: #5a6369;
  line-height: 1.45;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.vol-card .card-meta {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #94a3b8;
  border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  padding-top: 0.6rem;
  margin: 0;
}

/* ── Footer CTA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.footer-cta {
  background: #fdf2f8;
  border: 1px solid #fce7f3;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 2rem;
}
.footer-cta h2 {
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.footer-cta p {
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem;
}
.footer-cta a {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem;
  border-radius: 7px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  margin: 0 0.25rem;
}
.footer-cta .btn-primary {
  background: #BE185D;
  color: white !important;
}
.footer-cta .btn-primary:hover { background: #db2777; }
.footer-cta .btn-secondary {
  border: 1.5px solid #e2e8f0;
  color: #4a5568 !important;
}
.footer-cta .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #BE185D; color: #BE185D !important; }

/* ── Coming Soon Badge ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.coming-soon {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.6rem;
  background: rgba(190, 24, 93, 0.1);
  color: #BE185D;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
</style>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- HERO BAND -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="hero-band">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-top">
      <div class="hero-text">
        <p class="hero-desc">Complete Beamer slide decks with speaker notes, active learning, and original SVG diagrams for every chapter. Free to download, customize, and teach from.</p>
        <div class="hero-meta">
          <a href="vol1.html" class="btn-start">Browse Slides</a>
          <a href="teaching.html" class="btn-outline">Teaching Guide</a>
          <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/" class="cc-badge" target="_blank">CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-pillars">
        <div class="hp"><span class="hp-icon">&#x1F4CA;</span><span class="hp-label">Slides</span><span class="hp-sub">35 Decks</span></div>
        <div class="hp"><span class="hp-icon">&#x1F3A8;</span><span class="hp-label">Figures</span><span class="hp-sub">266 SVGs</span></div>
        <div class="hp"><span class="hp-icon">&#x1F3AF;</span><span class="hp-label">Active</span><span class="hp-sub">308 Exercises</span></div>
        <div class="hp"><span class="hp-icon">&#x1F50A;</span><span class="hp-label">Audio</span><span class="hp-sub">Coming Soon</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-numbers">
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">35</span><span class="hn-label">Decks</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">1,099</span><span class="hn-label">Slides</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">266</span><span class="hn-label">SVG Figures</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">~38 hrs</span><span class="hn-label">Teaching Time</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">23</span><span class="hn-label">Photos</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">308</span><span class="hn-label">Active Learning</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="hub-content">

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- VOLUME CARDS -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<div class="inv-header">Slide Decks</div>
<div class="vol-grid">
  <a href="vol1.html" class="vol-card">
    <span class="tag">Volume I</span>
    <h3>Introduction to Machine Learning Systems</h3>
    <p>17 decks covering the full single-machine ML stack: data engineering, neural computation, architectures, frameworks, training, compression, hardware, serving, and operations.</p>
    <div class="card-meta">570 slides &middot; 141 SVGs &middot; ~19 hrs &middot; 145 active learning moments</div>
  </a>
  <a href="vol2.html" class="vol-card">
    <span class="tag">Volume II</span>
    <h3>Machine Learning Systems at Scale</h3>
    <p>18 decks covering distributed infrastructure: compute clusters, network fabrics, distributed training, fault tolerance, fleet orchestration, inference at scale, and governance.</p>
    <div class="card-meta">529 slides &middot; 125 SVGs &middot; ~19 hrs &middot; 163 active learning moments</div>
  </a>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- WHAT'S INCLUDED -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<div class="inv-header">What's Included</div>
<table class="inventory-table">
  <tr>
    <td>Speaker Notes</td>
    <td>Every slide has timing estimates, teaching guidance, common student errors, and discussion prompts.</td>
    <td><a href="teaching.html">Guide &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Active Learning</td>
    <td>5+ exercises per deck: predict, calculate, discuss, peer instruction, retrieval practice, muddiest point.</td>
    <td><a href="teaching.html#active-learning-1">Details &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>SVG Diagrams</td>
    <td>266 original vector diagrams with semantic colors. Editable source files — not locked images.</td>
    <td><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides">Source &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Beamer Source</td>
    <td>Full LaTeX source with custom theme. Fork, customize, rebuild with <code>make</code>.</td>
    <td><a href="teaching.html#customizing-the-slides">Customize &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Semester Plans</td>
    <td>16-week schedules for Vol I, Vol II, and a combined 32-week plan.</td>
    <td><a href="teaching.html#suggested-semester-plans">Plans &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
</table>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- RELATED RESOURCES -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<div class="inv-header">Related Resources</div>
<table class="inventory-table">
  <tr>
    <td>Textbook</td>
    <td>The slides are derived from this two-volume open textbook. Read online or download PDF.</td>
    <td><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I</a> &middot; <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol2/">Vol II</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Instructor Blueprint</td>
    <td>Syllabi, assessment rubrics, TA guide, and course customization — the full teaching toolkit.</td>
    <td><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/instructors/">Blueprint &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Interactive Labs</td>
    <td>32 browser-based labs powered by MLSys&middot;IM. Pair with slides for hands-on learning.</td>
    <td><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/labs/">Labs &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Hardware Kits</td>
    <td>Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and Seeed deployment labs for TinyML and edge AI.</td>
    <td><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/">Kits &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
</table>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- AUDIO LECTURES (COMING SOON) -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<div class="footer-cta">
  <h2>Audio Lectures <span class="coming-soon">Coming Soon</span></h2>
  <p>AI-generated narration synchronized to each slide deck, based on the speaker notes written by the textbook author. Designed for self-paced learning and flipped classroom use.</p>
  <a href="teaching.html" class="btn-primary">Teaching Guide</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book" class="btn-secondary">View on GitHub</a>
</div>

</div>
```
